user.title: Discovery required
user.description: Install and start the YouTube Audio Downloader App. The App securely sends its connection details to Home Assistant, so you never need to retrieve or enter a token. Return to the integrations page when the discovered integration appears.

hassio_confirm.title: Set up YouTube Audio Downloader
hassio_confirm.description: Home Assistant discovered **{app}**. Submit to add it.

reauth_confirm.title: Refresh App discovery
reauth_confirm.description: The App rejected its generated token. Restart the YouTube Audio Downloader App and wait for it to rediscover this integration. You never need to retrieve or enter the token yourself.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the App. Make sure it is running, then try again.
error.invalid_auth: The App rejected its discovery token. Restart or reinstall the App to publish fresh discovery details.
error.invalid_response: The App returned incompatible identity or API information. Update the App and try again.

abort.already_configured: This App instance is already configured. Its connection details were updated.
abort.discovery_required: Configuration is available only through automatic App discovery. Start the App and wait for Home Assistant to discover it.
abort.invalid_discovery: The App sent incomplete or invalid discovery details.
abort.incompatible_api_version: This App API version is not supported. Update the integration and the App.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one App instance can be configured. Remove the old integration entry before adding a replacement App installation.
abort.invalid_auth: The App rejected its discovery token. Restart or reinstall the App to publish fresh discovery details.
abort.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the discovered App. Make sure it is running and try again.
abort.invalid_response: The discovered App returned incompatible identity or API information.

download.name: Download audio
download.description: Queue one supported YouTube URL for audio download.

url.name: URL
url.description: A supported HTTPS YouTube video URL.

download_batch.name: Download audio batch
download_batch.description: Atomically queue between 1 and 50 supported YouTube URLs.

urls.name: URLs
urls.description: A list of supported HTTPS YouTube video URLs.

not_configured.message: YouTube Audio Downloader is not configured or loaded. Start the App and complete the discovered integration flow.

invalid_auth.message: The App rejected its integration token. Restart the App so it can rediscover the integration.

service_unavailable.message: The App is unavailable. Make sure it is running and try again.

invalid_request.message: The request is incomplete or contains an invalid value.

invalid_url.message: The URL is invalid. Use a standard HTTPS YouTube video, Short, or embed URL.

unsupported_host.message: The URL host is unsupported. Use youtube.com or youtu.be.

duplicate_job.message: This video is already queued or active, or the batch contains it more than once.

queue_full.message: The App download queue is full. Wait for a job to finish and try again.

service_stopping.message: The App is stopping and cannot accept downloads. Start it and try again.
